title: Equal sign
description: Practice telling which equation is true.

hints:
$\begin{align}
&\blue{8=5-4}\\
&\blue{8=1}\\
\end{align}$  
This is not true because $8$ is not the same as $1$.

&\purple{9=8}\\
\end{align}$
